SessionStart.description: Inject prior session summary for cross-session continuity.

PreToolUse.description: Warn before git push so the diff gets reviewed first.

PostToolUse.description: Record tool usage observations for knowledge extraction (Bash commands only in Codex).

Stop.description: Persist session summary for next-session context.
Delete temporary safety backups for this session.
Delete temporary async typecheck state for this session.

unsupported_events: PostToolUseFailure — not a Codex event. Tool-call-correction runs only in VS Code Copilot.
PreCompact — not a Codex event. Pre-compact runs only in VS Code Copilot.
bash_only_limitation: PreToolUse/PostToolUse only fire for Bash tool calls in Codex CLI.
Write/Edit/MultiEdit hooks (doc-file-warning, config-protection, quality-gate, post-edit-format, post-edit-typecheck, post-edit-console-warn) cannot run in Codex.
Use AGENTS.md instructions and security.rules to enforce these policies instead.
